zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Stanbridge於1440年出生在英國米德萊可霍爾波恩時，她的父親John Stanbridge14歲，母親Ann Ivotts20歲。她於1465年6月5日與Sir John Deol Michael Cowper在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國貝德福爾阿爾享年70歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾阿爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stanbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English ston ‘stone’ (Old English stān) + brigge ‘bridge’ (Old English brycg). The surname may also be a habitational name from any of various places so called, including Stanbridge (Bedfordshire, Hampshire), Stanbridge Grange in Slaugham (Sussex), Great and Little Stambridge (Essex), and Stone Bridge in Shalford (Surrey).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Stanbridge was born in 1440, in Holborn, Middlesex, England, her father, John Stanbridge, was 14 and her mother, Ann Ivotts, was 20. She married Sir John Deol Michael Cowper on 5 June 1465, in West Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1510, in Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Stanbridge est née en 1440, à Holborn, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Stanbridge, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Ann Ivotts, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Deol Michael Cowper le 5 juin 1465, à West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Arlesey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stanbridge è nata il nel 1440 nel Holborn, Middlesex, England, sua padre, John Stanbridge, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Ann Ivotts, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Deol Michael Cowper il 5 giugno 1465, nel West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1510, nel Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Arlesey, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Stanbridgeが1440年にイギリスミッドレセックスホールボルンで生まれた時，父John Stanbridgeは14歳，母Ann Ivottsは20歳であった。1465年6月5日にイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスでSir John Deol Michael Cowperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアアルレセイで70歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアアルレセイにて埋葬された。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Stanbridge(이)가 1440년 영국 미들레세스 홀본에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stanbridge(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Ivotts(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1465년 6월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스에서 Sir John Deol Michael Cowper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 베드퍼드실르 알레시에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 알레시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stanbridge nasceu em 1440, em Holborn, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Stanbridge, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Ann Ivotts, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Deol Michael Cowper em 5 de junho de 1465, em West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Stanbridge родилась в 1440 г. в местности холборн, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Stanbridge было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Ivotts, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Deol Michael Cowper 5 июня 1465 г. в местности вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности арльси, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности арльси, бедфордшир, Англия.
